name: cloudiqus-toolkit
description: Foundation — North Star, autonomy rules, lessons, customer context, ACE lifecycle, AI consulting identity. Load first every session.

skills.name: ace-lifecycle
skills.description: AWS ACE (APN Customer Engagements) opportunity lifecycle. 7 stages from registration to close. Covers co-sell motions, PDM engagement, and funding triggers at each stage.

skills.name: ai-consulting-identity
skills.description: What makes CloudiQS a great AI consulting firm. The benchmark every output is measured against. Loaded when positioning CloudiQS, writing proposals, or preparing for any customer conversation about AI.

skills.name: autonomy-rules
skills.description: Defines what CloudiQS agents and team members can do autonomously (GREEN), must get approval for (AMBER), or must escalate immediately (RED). Apply to every action across every skill.

skills.name: cloudiqus-profile
skills.description: Full CloudiQS company profile — competencies, team, differentiators, proof points, partner tier. Used by outreach, discovery, and proposal skills to describe CloudiQS accurately.

skills.name: customer-context
skills.description: Template for per-customer context files. Create one per MSP customer. Loaded when working on that customer to give AI assistants full account knowledge without re-explaining every session.

skills.name: lessons-system
skills.description: The CloudiQS self-correction system. Read at the start of every session. Append every correction immediately. The system gets smarter over time.

skills.name: north-star
skills.description: Foundation skill. Always loaded first. Encodes why CloudiQS exists, the 4 commercial pillars, autonomy boundaries, and financial rules. Never skipped.

commands.name: customer-setup
commands.description: Create a new per-customer context file using the customer-context template. One file per MSP customer.

commands.name: daily-brief
commands.description: Generate today's CloudiQS daily brief — pipeline pulse, customer health, funding deadlines, and top 3 actions for Steve.

commands.name: lessons
commands.description: View, add, or update lessons in the CloudiQS lessons system. Run at start of session to load prior corrections.
